title: Gomesa pirarensis
taxonomy: Gomesa pirarensis is a species of orchid, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family of flowering plants is the largest in the angiosperm family tree, comprising over 30,000 species. Gomesa pirarensis is classified as a type of terrestrial orchid, which grows on land in a variety of habitats. The genus Gomesa is part of the subtribe Oncidiinae, which is a group of orchids that are known for their small, delicate flowers. Gomesa pirarensis is also often classified as a synonym for the species Oncidium pirarensis.
